heading: Detail of members of Army National Guard for rifle instruction of civilians
label: 316 Detail of members of Army National Guard for rifle instruction of civilians
text: The President may detail officers and noncommissioned officers of the Army National Guard to duty as instructors at rifle ranges for the training of civilians in the use of military arms.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)31632:183.(3d sentence), .June 3, 1916, ch. 134, § 11339 Stat. 211The word “civilians” is substituted for the word “citizenry”. The word “capable” is omitted as surplusage.
